sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69284" key="muriontaplasi/wn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῡρῐοντ-ᾰπλᾰσίων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:000" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">000</biblScope> </bibl> <sense id="n69284.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">times as great</tr_>, c. gen., Sch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2032.tlg001:1182:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Papp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1182.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
